name: Select
import: import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem } from '@/components/ui/select'
description: Dropdown select input built on Radix. Always use Select component, never raw <select>.
example:
<Select>
  <SelectTrigger>
    <SelectValue placeholder="Select option" />
  </SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="a">OPTION A</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="b">OPTION B</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
never: Never use raw <select> — always use Select from Radix
Never hardcode border-radius — handled by component
Never hardcode dropdown colors — use semantic tokens
